recap:
- Agent tools enhance AI agents by enabling them to interact with external systems and perform specific tasks, acting as the "hands" of the agent.
- Tools allow agents to manipulate data, call APIs, perform calculations, and generate reports, transforming them into actionable assistants.
- Unlike machine learning models that provide intelligence, agent tools are executable capabilities that enable agents to take action or retrieve information.
- Agent tools differ from chatbots by allowing agents to perform actions beyond just conversational responses, such as executing database queries or sending emails.
- Traditional APIs provide predefined functionalities, while agent tools are dynamic and can integrate various capabilities, including calling ML models or executing business logic.
